tasks.name: Example: audit my project with Claude
tasks.prompt: Read the codebase and write a code-quality audit to docs/audit.md. List concrete issues with file paths.

tasks.name: Example: implement fixes with Codex
tasks.prompt: Implement the fixes listed in docs/audit.md, run the tests, and summarize what changed.

tasks.name: Example: write release notes with Gemini
tasks.prompt: Read the git log since the last tag and write RELEASE_NOTES.md.
